name: clusterra-watch-job
info:
Polls a job until it reaches a terminal state (COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED, TIMEOUT, NODE_FAIL, OUT_OF_MEMORY, BOOT_FAIL, DEADLINE).

Input (on msg):
- `job_id` — required
- `poll_interval_ms` — default 5000
- `timeout_ms` — default 86400000 (24h)

Outputs:
1. final state (one msg when terminal)
2. transitions (one msg per state change)

name: init
eval state
next poll
